ObjLiveStreamResponse.ServiceDesc: A slow, stretch-based class that releases tight muscles, improves range of motion, and eases post-work tension. Ideal for desk workers, weight-lifters, and those on their feet all day who need tissue relief and recovery.

Until Sept 4, 26 Earn points attending this class to be redeemed for any workshops.
30-Minute Guided Meditation, 5-Minute Opening to Settle & Set Intention, Nature-Inspired Visualization with Yogic Principles, Gently Transporting the Mind to a Peaceful, Sacred Inner Sanctuary. All Skill Levels.

Helpful Props:
Cushion or Chair for Comfortable Seating, Blanket, Eye Cover

Receive the primal healing benefits of our full-spectrum infrared light sauna: detoxification, immune support, weight loss, anti-aging, deep relaxation, heart health, muscle recovery and sleep! 

Rest as long as you feel comfortable, for up to 20-45 minutes. 

CAUTION: 
1. Participate at your own risk. 
2. Check with your doctor prior to using. 
3. If you feel uncomfortable, dizzy, lightheaded, or nauseous, strep out, cool off and hydrate. 
4. Contraindicated if pregnant or hypotensive (low blood pressure). 

IMPORTANT: 
1. All participants MUST hydrate with at least 8 ounces of water before AND after sauna. Bring a water bottle. 
2. No nudity, this service is open to the public. Reserve a PRIVATE SAUNA time for solo sessions or your own group. 
3. Bring a towel. No laundry services available. 
4. Please observe silence or soft volume conversation to support a relaxed experience. 
5. Please leave the sauna as you found it, ready for the next guest.
ObjLiveStreamResponse.BusinessName: Lotus Care KC - Yoga Therapy & Wellness Studio
